summary: P1.8-10 B3.3: Zero-extension inventory metrics show muted Vietnamese no-extension affordance with aria-disabled; pending_return_count uses Juli suggestion-only path via refund_spike_detection when bar has no upside segment; non-zero extension metrics unchanged.

interfaceChanges.description: Renders muted no-extension copy with data-testid when estimated upside segment width is zero.
Surfaces disabled no-extension state for metrics without workflow links; passes noExtensionCopy to RealEstimatedBar when href exists but extension is zero.

mappings.criterion: Metrics with zero estimated extension render visible disabled muted or suggestion-only state
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue234_zero_extension_cta.test.tsx::pending_return_count tile documents disabled no-extension state on new-seller inventory tab

mappings.criterion: No div-only silent chart clicks without accessible label
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue234_zero_extension_cta.test.tsx::no-extension bar uses accessible disabled label not silent div-only chart

mappings.criterion: Integration test pending_return_count tile has documented interactive or disabled data-testid
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue234_zero_extension_cta.test.tsx::pending_return_count with workflow link offers Juli suggestion-only path when extension is zero

mappings.criterion: Does not regress linked metrics with non-zero extension
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue234_zero_extension_cta.test.tsx::does not regress linked metrics with non-zero extension on leakage inventory tab

mappings.criterion: Growth revenue estimated bar keeps non-zero extension link
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue234_zero_extension_cta.test.tsx::does not regress growth revenue estimated bar link
